info.title: QuizAPI
info.description: Access thousands of quiz questions across programming, science, and more. Browse by category, difficulty, and tags.

tags.name: Questions
tags.description: Retrieve questions for quizzes or browse across all quizzes

BearerAuth.description: Pass your API key as a Bearer token: `Authorization: Bearer qza_live_...`. Alternatively, use the `api_key` query parameter.

Difficulty.description: Difficulty level of a quiz or question

Answer.description: An answer option for a question

total.description: Total matching results across all pages

pageTotal.description: Number of results in this page

PaginationMeta.description: Pagination metadata included in browse responses

tags.description: Popular tags used in quizzes within this category (maximum 20 tags)

QuizListItem.description: A quiz summary returned in list endpoints

categoryId.description: Category ID (preferred over flat category string)

published.description: Whether the quiz is publicly visible

featured.description: Admin-only. Mark as featured in the Practice section. Ignored for non-admin users.

CreateQuizRequest.description: Request body for creating a quiz via the API

text.example: What is the typeof null in JavaScript?

explanation.example: typeof null returns 'object' due to a legacy bug in JavaScript.

QuizQuestionDetail.description: A question with answers, returned within a quiz detail

QuizDetail.description: Full quiz details including questions and answers

text.example: What is the typeof null in JavaScript?

explanation.example: typeof null returns 'object' due to a legacy bug in JavaScript.

QuizQuestion.description: A question belonging to a specific quiz (returned with quiz_id mode)

text.example: What is the typeof null in JavaScript?

explanation.example: typeof null returns 'object' due to a legacy bug.

BrowseQuestion.description: A question with quiz context (returned in browse mode)

text.example: What is the typeof null in JavaScript?

explanation.example: typeof null returns 'object' due to a legacy bug in JavaScript.

answers.description: At least 2 answers required. TRUE_FALSE must have exactly 2.

BatchQuestionInput.description: A question to create in the batch

get.description: Returns available categories, tags, difficulties, question types, and aggregate stats. No API key required — this is a discovery endpoint.

Returns the full Topic → Category hierarchy with quiz counts and popular tags per category. Use the returned category `id` as the `categoryId` when creating quizzes. No API key required — this is a discovery endpoint.
Returns a paginated list of published, approved quizzes (plus your own). Supports filtering by category, difficulty, tags, and free-text topic search.

schema.description: Free-text search in title, description, and tags

parameters.description: Free-text search in title, description, and tags
parameters.name: topic

schema.description: Sort order: popular (plays desc), newest (created desc), or title (alphabetical asc)

parameters.description: Sort order: popular (plays desc), newest (created desc), or title (alphabetical asc)
parameters.name: sort

schema.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination
parameters.name: offset

post.description: Create a new quiz. Requires a Starter or Pro plan (admins are exempt). Quiz creation limits are enforced per plan. Admins can set `featured: true` to display the quiz in the Practice section immediately. Non-admin users can add `featured` in the body but it will be silently ignored.

403.description: Free plan (upgrade required) or quiz limit reached

get.description: Returns full details for a single quiz including all questions and answers. Only published quizzes that are approved or owned by the API key holder are returned.

Two modes: (1) Pass `quiz_id` to get ordered questions for a specific quiz. (2) Omit `quiz_id` to browse questions across all published quizzes with pagination, filtering, and optional randomization. Only approved quizzes and your own quizzes are included.

schema.description: If provided, returns questions for this quiz (Mode 1). If omitted, enters browse mode (Mode 2).

parameters.description: If provided, returns questions for this quiz (Mode 1). If omitted, enters browse mode (Mode 2).
parameters.name: quiz_id

schema.description: Set to "true" to include answers (Mode 1 only). In browse mode, answers are always included.

parameters.description: Set to "true" to include answers (Mode 1 only). In browse mode, answers are always included.
parameters.name: include_answers

schema.description: Filter by quiz category. Supports comma-separated values for multiple categories (case-insensitive). Browse mode only.

parameters.description: Filter by quiz category. Supports comma-separated values for multiple categories (case-insensitive). Browse mode only.
parameters.name: category

schema.description: Filter by difficulty. Supports comma-separated values (case-insensitive). Browse mode only.

parameters.description: Filter by difficulty. Supports comma-separated values (case-insensitive). Browse mode only.
parameters.name: difficulty

schema.description: Filter by question type. Supports comma-separated values. Browse mode only.

parameters.description: Filter by question type. Supports comma-separated values. Browse mode only.
parameters.name: type

schema.description: Comma-separated tags to match (browse mode only)

parameters.description: Comma-separated tags to match (browse mode only)
parameters.name: tags

schema.description: Max questions to return per page in browse mode (1–50)

parameters.description: Max questions to return per page in browse mode (1–50)
parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Number of questions to skip for pagination (browse mode only)

parameters.description: Number of questions to skip for pagination (browse mode only)
parameters.name: offset

schema.description: Set to "true" to shuffle the returned questions randomly (browse mode only)

parameters.description: Set to "true" to shuffle the returned questions randomly (browse mode only)
parameters.name: random

400.description: Invalid parameters (e.g. bad difficulty or type value)

post.description: Import multiple questions into an existing quiz at once. Validates all questions before inserting — if any fail validation, the entire batch is rejected. Questions are appended after existing questions. **Requires a paid plan (Starter or Pro) or admin role.**

schema.description: The quiz ID to add questions to

parameters.description: The quiz ID to add questions to
parameters.name: id

403.description: Forbidden — free plan users cannot use batch import, or quiz is not owned by API key holder

422.description: Validation failed — one or more questions have errors
